items.question: How does CV Doktoru work?
items.answer: Upload your CV and our AI analyzes your strengths, weaknesses, missing keywords, and ATS compatibility within seconds.

items.question: Is my CV and data safe?
items.answer: Your uploaded CVs are tied to your account only and are never shared with other users. See our Privacy Policy for details.

items.question: What file formats can I upload?
items.answer: You can upload PDF and DOCX files, with full support for special characters.

items.question: Why do I need to verify my email?
items.answer: Email verification is required to use AI-powered analysis, rewriting, and job matching features. It doesn't affect signing up, logging in, or uploading CVs.

items.question: Is it free?
items.answer: All features are currently available for free.

aiTools.heading: Improve with AI
aiTools.historyEmpty: You haven't generated any AI output yet.
aiTools.copyFailed: Couldn't copy automatically — please select and copy manually.

descriptions.summary_rewrite: Rewrites your profile summary with sharper, more effective language.
descriptions.experience_rewrite: Strengthens your experience bullets with measurable achievements.
descriptions.skills_rewrite: Organizes your skills list so it stands out.
descriptions.ats_optimization: Optimizes your CV for applicant tracking systems.
descriptions.cover_letter: Generates a personalized cover letter for the role.
descriptions.linkedin_summary: Generates a ready-to-use summary for your LinkedIn profile.
descriptions.ats_keyword_insertion: Naturally weaves the missing keywords into your CV.

coverLetter.title: Generate Cover Letter
coverLetter.description: Add a few details to tailor the letter to the job you're targeting.

aiOutput.shareFallback: Sharing isn't supported here, copied to clipboard instead.

summary_rewrite.whatFor: Rewrites the profile summary at the top of your CV to grab a recruiter's attention in the first few seconds.
summary_rewrite.howToUse: Paste this text over your current profile summary section, updating any details as needed.

experience_rewrite.whatFor: Rewrites your experience bullet points with stronger, measurable-achievement-driven language.
experience_rewrite.howToUse: Compare the bullets to your current experience section and copy over the ones that represent you best.

skills_rewrite.whatFor: Reorganizes your skills list to highlight the abilities that should stand out most.
skills_rewrite.howToUse: Transfer the list into your CV's skills section, keeping only the skills you genuinely have.

ats_optimization.whatFor: Suggests content and keyword changes so your CV is parsed better by applicant tracking systems (ATS).
ats_optimization.howToUse: Apply the suggested changes to the relevant sections of your CV, weaving in missing keywords naturally.

cover_letter.whatFor: Generates a personalized cover letter draft tailored to the role you're targeting.
cover_letter.howToUse: Review the letter in your own voice, add company-specific details, and send it with your application.

linkedin_summary.whatFor: Generates a ready-to-use, professional summary for your LinkedIn "About" section.
linkedin_summary.howToUse: Paste the text into your LinkedIn "About" section, adding a personal touch if you'd like.

ats_keyword_insertion.whatFor: Shows your CV with the keywords missing for this specific job naturally woven in.
ats_keyword_insertion.howToUse: Compare the result to your current CV and update the sections where the missing keywords were added.

interview_prep.whatFor: Lets you preview likely technical and HR interview questions for this specific job.
interview_prep.howToUse: Prepare short answers to the questions so you can walk into the interview with more confidence.

salary_estimation.whatFor: Gives a realistic salary range estimate based on your experience, the role, and the location you entered.
salary_estimation.howToUse: Use this range as a reference point in salary negotiations — it's an estimate, not a guaranteed offer.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.subtitle: User, content, and AI usage summaries.

sections.title: Data Controller
sections.body: CV Doktoru acts as the data controller under Turkey's Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 (KVKK); for users located in the European Union, the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) is also observed where applicable. This policy explains what personal data we process when you use CV Doktoru — including our website and Android app — and for what purposes.

sections.title: Personal Data We Collect
sections.body: When you create an account, we collect your first name, last name, email address, and password (stored irreversibly encrypted). When you use the service, we process the CV files you upload, the text extracted from them, the generated analysis and ATS compatibility results, the job descriptions you enter, the AI outputs you request (e.g. rewrites, cover letters, LinkedIn summaries), and basic account-security records (e.g. email verification status).

sections.title: Purposes of Processing
sections.body: Your personal data is processed solely to create and manage your account, provide the CV analysis / ATS compatibility / job matching service, generate the AI-powered suggestions you request, keep your account secure, and meet our legal obligations. Your data is never sold for advertising purposes and is never shared with third parties for marketing purposes.

sections.title: Use of AI (OpenAI)
sections.body: CV analysis, rewrite suggestions, and job matching results are generated using OpenAI's AI models. During this process, your CV content and (if provided) the job description text are sent to OpenAI only to respond to that specific request. This data is not used for marketing or advertising and is not shared with any third party other than OpenAI.

sections.title: Third-Party Service Providers We Use
sections.body: To operate the service, we work with a limited number of subprocessors, each performing only the function required: OpenAI for analysis and AI outputs; Brevo for delivering transactional emails such as account verification and password reset; and Railway (backend) and Vercel (frontend hosting) for our server infrastructure. These providers process your data only on CV Doktoru's behalf, only to the extent needed to deliver the service, and may process it in the countries where their own infrastructure is located; they do not use your data for their own marketing purposes.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.body: Your data is transmitted to and from our servers over encrypted HTTPS connections. Your password is stored irreversibly hashed; email verification and password reset links are likewise verified only against a hashed value and their raw form is never stored in our database. Access to your data is limited to the systems required for the service to function.

sections.title: Account Deletion
sections.body: You can permanently delete your account from your account settings. When you do, the CV files you uploaded are physically removed from our servers, and all data tied to your account — including analyses, job matches, and AI outputs — is permanently deleted from our database. This action cannot be undone.

sections.title: Data Retention Period
sections.body: Your data is retained for as long as your account remains active; no automatic deletion is applied unless you delete your account yourself. Email verification links automatically expire after 24 hours, and password reset links after 1 hour.

sections.title: Cookies and Local Storage
sections.body: CV Doktoru does not use cookies to keep you signed in; instead it uses your browser's or app's local storage (localStorage), which holds your session token and your theme (light/dark) preference. No third-party advertising, tracking, or analytics cookies or SDKs are used.

sections.title: Your Rights Under KVKK
sections.body: Under Article 11 of Law No. 6698, you have the right to learn whether your personal data is being processed, to request information about such processing, to learn the purpose of processing and whether it is used consistently with that purpose, to know the third parties to whom your data is transferred domestically or abroad, to request correction if it is processed incompletely or incorrectly, to request deletion once the reasons for processing no longer apply, and to request that these actions be notified to the third parties to whom your data has been transferred.

sections.title: Your Rights Under GDPR (for EU Users)
sections.body: Users located in the European Union additionally have the right, under GDPR, to access, rectify, and erase ("right to be forgotten") their data, to restrict processing, to data portability, and to object to processing; you also retain the right to lodge a complaint with the relevant supervisory authority.

sections.title: Changes to This Policy
sections.body: We may update this policy from time to time to reflect changes to our service or to comply with legal requirements. The current version is always published on this page.

sections.title: Contact
sections.body: For privacy-related questions or to exercise your rights, reach us at destek@cvdoktoru.com.tr.

sections.title: Description of Service
sections.body: CV Doktoru provides AI-powered CV analysis, rewriting suggestions, and job matching.

sections.title: Creating an Account
sections.body: To use the service you must create an account with accurate, up-to-date information. You are responsible for the security of your account and the confidentiality of your password.

sections.title: Prohibited Use
sections.body: You may not use the service for unlawful purposes, in ways that infringe on others' rights, by uploading fraudulent or unauthorized content, or through automation or abuse that disrupts the service's normal operation.

sections.title: About AI-Generated Output
sections.body: Analysis, suggestion, and matching results are generated by AI; they are advisory in nature and carry no guarantee of accuracy. Final decisions remain yours.

sections.title: Service Interruptions
sections.body: The service may experience temporary interruptions due to maintenance, updates, or unforeseen technical issues. Uninterrupted or error-free access is not guaranteed.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.body: The service is provided "as is." To the maximum extent permitted by law, CV Doktoru is not liable for the accuracy of AI-generated output or for indirect damages arising from use of the service.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.body: The CV content you upload belongs to you. The platform's design and software belong to CV Doktoru.

sections.title: Account Closure
sections.body: You may close your account at any time from your account settings. CV Doktoru reserves the right to suspend or close an account for violating these terms.

sections.title: Changes to the Service
sections.body: We may update the service and these terms from time to time. We will try to notify you of material changes.

sections.title: Contact
sections.body: You can reach us at destek@cvdoktoru.com.tr with any questions.

refund.title: Refund and Cancellation Policy
refund.intro: Our billing infrastructure (PayTR) is currently being set up; Pro plans cannot yet be purchased. This policy describes the refund and cancellation terms that will apply once paid plans go live.

sections.title: Monthly Subscription
sections.body: Once the Pro monthly subscription is active, your payment renews automatically on the same date each month and you are charged for the upcoming period.

sections.title: Annual Subscription
sections.body: The Pro Annual plan begins with a single upfront charge for the full year and renews automatically at the end of the year.

sections.title: Cancellation Process
sections.body: You can cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings. Cancelling does not affect your access for the remainder of the current period; the next renewal simply won't occur.

sections.title: Renewal
sections.body: Subscriptions renew automatically unless cancelled. You'll receive a notification to your registered email address before each renewal.

sections.title: Refund Conditions
sections.body: Due to the digital nature of the service, no refund is given for a period that has already been paid for and used. If a technical error prevents the service from being delivered at all, your request will be reviewed and a full refund may be issued.

sections.title: Note on Digital Services
sections.body: Under Turkey's Distance Contracts Regulation, the right of withdrawal ends once you give explicit consent for immediate performance of a digital service delivered electronically. This consent will be collected separately before purchase.

sections.title: Payment Provider
sections.body: Your payments will be processed through PayTR's secure payment infrastructure. Your card details are not stored on CV Doktoru's servers; the transaction is handled directly by PayTR's PCI-DSS compliant systems.

pricing.title: Free during beta.
pricing.subtitle: Use CV Doktoru's current analysis and improvement tools free of charge throughout the beta.
pricing.billingNote: No payment or credit card is required during beta. Usage limits help prevent abuse.

free.name: Beta
free.description: Free access to all current core features.
features: Explainable CV and ATS compatibility analysis
Version history and AI output archive

items.question: Do I need to pay during beta?
items.answer: No. No payment or credit card is required during the beta period.

items.question: What exactly counts toward the hourly limit of 20 AI generations?
items.answer: CV analysis, job matching, cover letters, ATS optimization, and rewrites all share this limit when they use a real AI call. The limit resets automatically every hour.

items.question: How long will beta access last?
items.answer: You will be notified in advance in the app and by email if the beta terms change.

about.title: What Is CV Doktoru?
about.intro: CV Doktoru is an AI-powered CV improvement and career platform. It analyzes your CV, measures your ATS compatibility, matches you against job listings, and generates content to strengthen your applications.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: To help every job seeker put their best CV forward with AI support and reach the right opportunities more easily.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: To be the leading platform that makes AI accessible, reliable, and transparent for everyone's career development.
